subcodes.first_line: ...The highest expression of the life of man on this planet in this age and many ages to come is Celestial
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @transmutation of the soul by the divine elixir
